qa_pairs.question: What happens after a Group Member submits their application?
qa_pairs.answer: After a Group Member submits their application, an email will be sent to their Sponsor asking them to confirm the application.

qa_pairs.question: What do users receive once their account request has been approved?
qa_pairs.answer: Once an account request has been approved, users will receive a notification email.

qa_pairs.question: What information should users note after their request is approved?
qa_pairs.answer: Users should note their Role Identifier (CCRI) after their request is approved.

qa_pairs.question: What is the responsibility of a Principal Investigator (PI) regarding their CCRI?
qa_pairs.answer: If you are a PI, you will need to provide your CCRI to all Group Members that you will be sponsoring.

qa_pairs.question: How can a user retrieve a forgotten CCRI?
qa_pairs.answer: If you forget your CCRI, you can log in to the system to retrieve it.

qa_pairs.question: What login credentials should users remember?
qa_pairs.answer: Users should note the email address they used to register and the password they created.
